tips.message: Shopify pattern: direct `product.*` access does not exist in platformOS. Use a custom schema + GraphQL query.

domain_guide.rule: Pages are controllers — logic only, no inline HTML. Use graphql/render/function/redirect_to tags.

triggered_gotchas.message: In pages, use `context.params`, `context.session`, `context.current_user`, `context.page` — bare variable names are not valid.
Page title: use `metadata: { title: 'Static Title' }` in front matter for static titles, or `{% content_for 'title' %}Dynamic Title{% endcontent_for %}` for data-dependent titles.

Slugs use `:param` for dynamic segments (NOT `[param]`, `{param}`, or `<param>`). No leading `/`. For the home page (root `/`), omit the slug entirely — `app/views/pages/index.html.liquid` serves `/` by default. Examples: `products/:id`, `users/:user_id/orders/:id`, `search(/:query)`.
